name: Vision Document Analyzer
description: Feed an image or PDF straight into a vision LLM, extract the fields, and enforce a typed schema on the output — invoice parsing, chart reading, form extraction. The Multimodal Input replaces the Start node.

data.label: Image → vision LLM → typed output
data.text: The Multimodal Input is the entry point (no Start node needed). It hands the image to a vision-capable LLM, which extracts the fields; Structured Output enforces a Pydantic schema so the result is machine-usable.

data.label: Document Image
data.textPrompt: Extract every line item, the totals, and the invoice date from this document.

data.label: Vision Extractor
data.systemPrompt: You read documents. Extract the requested fields accurately from the provided image.
